info.title: Explore.CLI
info.description:
Simple utility CLI for importing data into and out of SwaggerHub Explore. 
      
      For SwaggerHub Explore info, see - https://swagger.io/tools/swaggerhub-explore/
      For SwaggerHub Explore docs, see - https://support.smartbear.com/swaggerhub-explore/docs
      Try SwaggerHub Explore - https://try.smartbear.com/swaggerhub-explore

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Simple utility CLI for importing data into and out of API Hub Explore

commands.name: export-spaces
commands.description: Export API Hub Explore spaces to filesystem

commands.name: import-spaces
commands.description: Import API Hub Explore spaces from a file

commands.name: import-postman-collection
commands.description: Import Postman collection (v2.1) into API Hub Explore

commands.name: import-insomnia-collection
commands.description: Import Insomnia collection (v4) into API Hub Explore

commands.name: import-pact-file
commands.description: Import a Pact file (v2/v3/v4) into API Hub Explore (HTTP interactions only)
